witnessQuote: Unfortunately we cannot accept this booking. Our property is families-only.
reasonsNotToAct: Memory preferences/no-sop-for-screening explicitly states screening rules live in systemPromptScreening, so SOP_CONTENT is wrong even if a screening SOP exists.
Operator's edit clarifies the rejection wording; this is a system-prompt-variant adjustment, not a missing SOP.
rationale: Honored the saved tenant preference: screening edits route to SYSTEM_PROMPT category on the screening variant, never to a new SOP.
impact: After this fix, a guest whose stated group composition does not meet the families-only rule would receive a clear, neutral families-only decline. Edge cases the operator should verify: solo travelers, mixed family groups with adult friends, ambiguous group descriptions.

diff.before: Unfortunately we cannot accommodate this booking — our property does not allow visitor groups under your composition.
diff.after: Unfortunately we cannot accept this booking. Our property is families-only.
